landing.title: It's okay. You can talk here.
landing.subtitle: Free. Anonymous. Nothing you say is stored.
landing.reassurance: No name. No account. No sign-up. When you leave, everything is gone.

chat.endedNote: This conversation is gone now. Nothing was kept. Come back anytime.

support.panelTitle: Real people you can reach right now
support.panelNote: All of these are free. None of them will know who you are unless you tell them.
support.sevencups: 7 Cups — chat with a listener online
